inboxCount: {count, plural, =0{You have no new messages, {name}.} =1{You have 1 new message, {name}.} other{You have {count} new messages, {name}.}}
userGenderRole: {gender, select, male{He is an admin.} female{She is an admin.} other{They are an admin.}}
complexSale: {itemsCount, plural, =0{No items in your cart.} =1{You have 1 item in your cart costing {price}.} other{You have {itemsCount} items in your cart costing {price}.}}
